examples: Ireland's benchmark ISEQ stock index dropped 4% in intraday trading.
SAP sank 3.3 percent to 37.04 euros, the biggest intraday drop since May.
The Stock Exchange of Thailand Index was recently down 4.5% at 754.14 points, its intraday low.
While the average did finish lower, the intraday price action is suggestive of capitulation.
So the market moves to new levels, both up and down, in sharper intraday moves.
